title: LeverageAI ElevenLabs webhook tools
description: Canonical schemas used by the fresh-account provisioning script. Tools are created in the workspace toolbox and attached to agents by tool_ids.

tools.name: submit_spec
tools.description: Submit the structured job specification only after the user explicitly confirms the spoken read-back.

intake_id.description: Exact intake UUID supplied as a dynamic variable.

vertical.description: Active vertical id supplied as a dynamic variable.

confirmed.description: Must be true after an explicit user yes.

job_spec.description: Only facts stated by the user, keyed by the active vertical field ids.

tools.name: log_quote
tools.description: Persist a vendor quote. Call once for the initial committed offer and again with is_update=true after a concession. Log only amounts the vendor stated.

job_id.description: Confirmed job UUID from dynamic variables.

session_id.description: Current session UUID from dynamic variables.

company_key.description: Current vendor role id from dynamic variables.

company_name.description: Current vendor display name from dynamic variables.

line_items.description: Every fee stated by the vendor. Amounts must sum to grand_total.

label.description: Vendor-stated fee category, using a configured quote category where possible.

amount.description: Exact amount stated by the vendor for this line.

optional.description: True only when the vendor explicitly says this amount is optional or excluded.

grand_total.description: Committed total stated by this vendor.

is_update.description: True when this offer replaces a prior offer from the same session.

tools.name: get_competing_bids
tools.description: Return only real quotes already stored for this job, excluding the current session. This is the sole source of competing-bid leverage.

job_id.description: Confirmed job UUID from dynamic variables.

session_id.description: Current session UUID to exclude from results.

tools.name: lookup_benchmark
tools.description: Return the sourced fair-price benchmark configured for this exact job vertical and job type.

job_id.description: Confirmed job UUID from dynamic variables.

tools.name: close_session
tools.description: End the negotiation with exactly one structured outcome after logging any itemized quote first.

job_id.description: Confirmed job UUID from dynamic variables.

session_id.description: Current session UUID from dynamic variables.

outcome_type.description: Exactly one terminal outcome. itemized_quote requires a complete logged quote; callback_commitment requires a specific window.

callback_window.description: Required when a callback or visit was offered.

summary.description: One factual sentence explaining the terminal outcome.
